title: Sonic the Hedgehog
description: Score attack — most points after completing a fixed set of acts wins. Ring count contributes to score.

rings.notes: AR: FFFE20:00C8. Ring count (16-bit BE). Poll at 0xFE20.

score.notes: Score (32-bit BE). Confirmed TCRF location for Sonic 1 MD.

stage_act.notes: AR: FFFE10:XXYY — XX=stage (0-5), YY=act (0-2). Stage/act indicator.

timer_minutes.notes: Act timer minutes. Part of FFFE24-FFFE26 timer bytes.

tournament_rules: Score attack through Green Hill Zone (3 acts). Highest score wins. Simultaneous start, same save state. Rings held at end of act add time bonus to score.
sources: libretro-database/cht MD AR: FFFE12 lives, FFFE20 rings, FFFE10 stage/act
